expectations.text: Response generates complete OG meta tags (title, description, image, url, type)
expectations.evidence: generateSocialMeta function produces og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, og:type along with og:image:width, og:image:height, og:image:alt, og:site_name, og:locale

expectations.text: Response generates Twitter Card meta tags with summary_large_image
expectations.evidence: Function includes twitter:card with content 'summary_large_image', plus twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image, twitter:image:alt, twitter:site

expectations.text: Response creates dynamic OG image endpoint
expectations.evidence: src/routes/api/og.tsx creates an API route using createAPIFileRoute('/api/og') that generates a 1200x630 ImageResponse with title and author from query params using @vercel/og
URLs are constructed as absolute: const url = `https://devnotes.sh/blog/${post.slug}` and const ogImage = `https://devnotes.sh/api/og?...`

expectations.text: Response integrates in route head() function using loaderData
expectations.evidence: Blog post route uses head: ({ loaderData }) => { const { post } = loaderData; ... return { meta: [...generateSocialMeta({...})] } }
